[[Admiral/Legends|Admiral]] '''Vara Karathas''' was the chief of staff and military head of the [[Corellian Defense Force/Legends|Corellian Defense Force]] during the [[Second Galactic Civil War]]. She helped plan and execute the [[Battle of Tralus (Second Galactic Civil War)|Battle of Tralus]].

{{Char-stub}}
